return(function(...)local h,Y in ipairs({{-911592+911593;549766-549285},{451525-451524,-682292-(-682379)};{732860-732772;-84051-(-84532)}})do while Y[347256-347255]<Y[-51361-(-51363)]do local function h(h)return K[h+(824054+-759464)]end do local h=type local Y=string.sub local c=math.floor local H=table.concat local end end return(function(K,c,H,p,R,Q,d,Z,Y,T,j,q,P,g,M,e,a,f,B,i)e,M,Z,Y,j,a,P,i,B,T,g,f,q=function(K)local h,Y=-14356+14357,K[-906980-(-906981)]while Y do
